hardBoundary: DSXU lane public-comparable raw evidence is ready 30/30 and stale intermediate DSXU lane rerun or partial import failures are superseded in the dashboard. P12 target/reference readiness and clean export preflight are closed. Public-comparable 30-case external comparison remains blocked until same-case targetReferenceTranscriptPath evidence is collected for those 30 cases. Public 95/superiority claims remain blocked by scoreFloor and external-comparison boundaries.
